sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73659" key="o(moioplath/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁμοιο-πλᾰτής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n73659.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of like breadth,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:48:58:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">48.58.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
